title: nephrodium foenisecii var. tripinnatum
intro: Nephrodium foenisecii var. tripinnatum, also known as Lady Fern, is a variety of fern species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The medicinal properties of Lady Fern include its use as a diuretic and astringent, which can help reduce inflammation and ease urinary tract issues. The health benefits of Lady Fern include its ability to alleviate symptoms of kidney stones, urinary incontinence, and menstrual cramps, making it a popular herbal remedy for women's health issues. Lady Fern can be prepared through herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
